notes: Case 2008-15 (Morton Smith v. Western Carolina Presbytery, docketed 2008) was located in the roster index with a null locator, indicating no explicit reference to its decision in the roster. Hunt identified only historical roster pages from ga01_1973 and ga03_1975 mentioning the individuals and presbytery names as persons/offices, but no actual case decision/opinion text was found in any candidate pages. The case appears to be missing from the available GA minutes materials.
